name: Pumpking Ginger Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Light brown sugar; lightly packed
Zest of 1 lemon, orange; or grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients for the filling and beat well.
2. Pour into the partially baked pie shell.
3. Bake in an oven preheated to 325°F for about 50 minutes or until the center of the pie is set.
4. Serve with lightly sweetened Sour Cream (see recipe) and garnish with a little crystallized ginger.
VARIATIONS:
Sweet potatoes or any of the meaty winter squashes can be used in place of the pumpkin.
A fourth cup raisins plumped in the liquors can also be added.
One cup milk or half-and-half can also be added to the filling.
